**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**

**Periodic Transaction Report**

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Report type: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

*(For Official Use Only)* — Legislative Resource Center stamp: 18 AUG 10 AM 9:04, U.S. House of Representatives; "HAND DELIVERED".

A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

Transaction table header: FULL ASSET NAME | TYPE OF TRANSACTION (Purchase / Sale / Exchange) | DATE OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY) | DATE NOTIFIED OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY) | AMOUNT OF TRANSACTION (A $1,001-$15,000; B $15,001-$50,000; C $50,001-$100,000; D $100,001-$250,000; E $250,001-$500,000; F $500,001-$1,000,000; G $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H $5,000,001-$25,000,000; I $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J Over $50,000,000; K Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000)

Example row (greyed, ignored): JT | Mega Corp. Common Stock | Sale | 02/05/015 | 03/07/15 | B

Data rows on this page: "Please see the attached".
